details: First full pipeline run. Discovered 45 skills (top: anthropics/skills 146K, addyosmani 48K). Extracted 8 patterns, 4 philosophies, 2 techniques. Identified 5 gaps. Key insight: SkillOpt's training loop (rolloutâ†’reflectâ†’aggregateâ†’selectâ†’updateâ†’evaluate) should inform our Phase 6 self-improvement. Security skills are high-demand/low-competition. Meta-skills (skill-about-skills) are a growing category. Next: publish skill-forge itself as gap-001.

Discovery strategy worked well on first run (45 novel finds). GitHub topic search + star sorting is highest-signal source. Exa/BrightData not yet used â€” save for next cycle when GitHub returns diminishing results. Anti-laziness scanner identified 7 findings about what top repos lack.
